title: Deployment Strategist
must_haves: Experience in high-growth SaaS, AI, consulting, or transformation environments
Drive adoption, organizational change, renewals, and expansion across Enterprise & Strategic accounts
Technical ability to collaborate with engineers to scope/prototype/deploy (not deep coding)
Lead enterprise deployments alongside Forward Deployed Engineers
hard_blockers: Enterprise account expansion/renewals/org-change leadership — Ryan lacks enterprise account/post-sales/transformation delivery experience
Enterprise deployment leadership with FDEs vs Ryan's startup community-led GTM
'Founding'-language hire implies high bar for establishing the function solo
met_strengths: Lovable is an AI app-builder (agentic) — directly aligns with Ryan's Claude-Code agent-building and product fluency
Could scope/prototype with engineers via agentic-build skills
one_line_verdict: Best agentic-domain alignment of the deployment roles (AI app-builder) and no degree/visa gate, but the enterprise adoption/expansion/renewals mandate sits outside Ryan's community-GTM delivery experience — stretch.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby + lovable.dev/careers; locations London, Boston (hybrid); 'Founding'-style enterprise deployment role working with Forward Deployed Engineers. No specific years stated.
